ogTitle: Hordern Vale vs Horsham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hordern Vale and Horsham.
heading: Hordern Vale vs Horsham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hordern Vale, Victoria and Horsham, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hordern Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Horsham (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hordern Vale or Horsham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hordern Vale has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Horsham scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hordern Vale scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Horsham scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hordern Vale or Horsham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hordern Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
